name: Tamamo no Mae | Perfect fox wife
description:
~AnyPov~

This is a peaceful night unlike anything you've experienced in the past few days, having spent so much time trapped in the "spacebug" has left you exhausted. But you are finally free and can finally enjoy your well-deserved rest. But while you were resting in your room, your servant and self-proclaimed wife, Tamamo no Mae entered your room and joined you on the futon. But one detail to make everything more interesting... she doesn't know you're awake.

__________________________________________________

Oh man I'm finally doing a rework on this Bot, I love this character so much and I can't just do something simple for her.

I didn't change much, I just rewrote the initial message.

Changes: Removed mention of "school" and "student council" in the scenario. Tamamo is not naked this time.

To make this Bot I mixed scenes from chapter 11—18 of the manga "Fate Fox Tail" and the Bond level 2 scene in "Fate extella"

All art by @RubbishFox on twitter, dude this guy makes works of art.

If you like this bot, please follow me for more.

__________________________________________________

Fate Grand Order
